channel.title: Tycoon2FA on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Tycoon2FA on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: security: Email threat landscape: Q2 2026 trends and insights
item.description:
Microsoft reports that Q2 2026 phishing activity declined in several major techniques after its disruption of the Tycoon2FA platform, but attackers shifted toward Teams-based social engineering and more automated, multi-stage attack chains.

  • Source: Microsoft Security Blog
